array.string:
UTMCTL=/Applications/UTM.app/Contents/MacOS/utmctl VM_NAME=hassio USB_VID=0658 USB_PID=0200
# Wait for UTM to be running for i in $(seq 1 30); do $UTMCTL list &>/dev/null && break sleep 2 done
# Start the VM if not already running STATUS=$($UTMCTL status "$VM_NAME" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}') if [ "$STATUS" != "started" ]; then $UTMCTL start "$VM_NAME" sleep 10 fi
# Connect Z-Wave USB stick for i in $(seq 1 10); do if $UTMCTL usb list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "$USB_VID:$USB_PID"; then $UTMCTL usb connect "$VM_NAME" "$USB_VID:$USB_PID" break fi sleep 2 done
